value.found_quote: The file also suppresses claude.ai connectors unless you [allow them alongside the managed set](#allow-claude-ai-connectors-alongside-the-managed-set).
value.rationale: The page explicitly describes that deploying managed-mcp.json suppresses claude.ai connectors by default, matching the claim. It further states "Deploying `managed-mcp.json` suppresses claude.ai connectors by default" in a dedicated section. Presented as current functionality.
